use tree_sitter::{Parser, Node};

fn extract_text(source: &str, node: Node) -> &str {
    let start = node.start_byte();
    let end = node.end_byte();
    &source[start..end]
}

fn get_column_at_byte(source: &str, byte_offset: usize) -> usize {
    source[..byte_offset].chars().count()
}

fn get_display_width(source: &str, node: Node) -> usize {
    let text = &source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()];
    text.chars().count()
}

fn line_col_from_byte(source: &str, byte_offset: usize) -> (usize, usize) {
    let before = &source[..byte_offset];
    let line = before.lines().count();
    let col = before.chars().count();
    (line, col)
}

fn get_char_at_offset(source: &str, byte_offset: usize) -> Option<char> {
    if !source.is_char_boundary(byte_offset) {
        return None;
    }
    source[byte_offset..].chars().next()
}
